entity.summary: Aptos decentralized exchange and liquidity engine with current liquidity, substantial historical swap volume, and continuing protocol income activity.
entity.notes: DefiLlama identifies Earnium as an Aptos DEX and liquidity engine and reports current TVL, substantial cumulative DEX volume, and continuing 2026 income activity. A stable first-party website URL was not recovered in this review pass.
